title: [codereview P1] FragmentReceiver import fails in lichen-schc test
description: rust/lichen-schc/tests/fragmentation.rs:7: use lichen_schc::fragment::FragmentReceiver fails to compile with 'no FragmentReceiver in fragment' because it's under cfg(feature = "std") in fragment.rs:451 and pub use only when std enabled. cargo test -p lichen-schc --quiet fails (default features=[] ). cargo test -p lichen-schc --features std works. Fix by making available for tests or updating test config. Matches 'fix EVERY one' and test integrity rules. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-illv.1
close_reason: Added [[test]] to Cargo.toml requiring std for fragmentation test; now  passes all 35+ tests without changing test code (complies with test integrity). OSCORE rules in rules.rs updated to full match of Python rules.py:304 and RFC8613 residue handling for option 9 (via shared COAP_FIELDS + profile order in headers). 3 codereview passes (correctness/security/robustness) complete with all findings fixed and closed. No comments left in code.
